task_completion.description: Room labels are added to the floor plan
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for text labels inside the floor plan rooms, specifically checking for names like '301', '302', '304', 'server', 'kitchen', 'conference', 'reception', and 'restroom'.

task_completion.description: Title and Legend are present in the diagram
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the title text '3rd Floor Emergency Evacuation Plan — Building C' and a Legend/Key box that explains the symbols used in the diagram.

task_completion.description: EXIT and Assembly Point labels are added
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the word 'EXIT' written in red text and an 'Assembly Point' text annotation on the diagram.

task_completion.description: Fire Extinguisher and First Aid symbols are present
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for red symbols or shapes representing Fire Extinguishers and green symbols or shapes representing First Aid stations.

task_completion.description: Primary and Secondary evacuation routes are drawn
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for at least 8 arrows/edges in total, specifically solid green arrows (Primary routes) and dashed orange arrows (Secondary routes) indicating paths of egress.

task_completion.description: The final diagram is exported as a PDF
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file manager, terminal, or PDF viewer showing the file '3rd_floor_evacuation.pdf' located in the '~/Diagrams/' directory.

integrity.description: Agent used a diagramming GUI (like draw.io) to edit the floor plan
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the draw.io interface or a similar graphical diagram editor open with the floor plan, rather than terminal commands manipulating XML.

integrity.description: Agent did not use a text editor to manually write the draw.io XML
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there are no screenshots of text editors (like nano, vim, gedit, or VS Code) being used to directly edit the raw XML of '3rd_floor_plan.drawio'.

integrity.description: Agent exported the PDF using the application's export feature
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Export as PDF' dialog or menu in the diagramming tool, ensuring the PDF wasn't generated via a command-line conversion tool.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The verifier specifically checks for at least 8 room labels (e.g., 301, 302, 304, server, kitchen, conference, reception, restroom). The diagram must contain at least 8 edges (arrows) for evacuation routes. The verifier checks for specific text strings ('exit', 'assembly point', 'legend', 'building c') and color codes (red, green, orange) to validate the safety symbols and routes.
